dom_htmlWithStyles:
#document
  #text "
"
  html lang="it"
    #text "
"
    head
      #text "
  "
      meta charset="UTF-8"
      #text "
  "
      title
        #text "DOM con CSS"
      #text "
  "
      style
        #text "
    body > main { font-family: serif; color: #222; }
    .invoice-title { color: #1d4ed8; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    #total { font-weight: bold; border-top: 1px solid #111; }
    .note::before { content: "<nota> "; }
  "
      #text "
"
    #text "
"
    body
      #text "
  "
      main class="invoice"
        #text "
    "
        h1 class="invoice-title"
          #text "Invoice demo"
        #text "
    "
        p class="note"
          #text "This text verifies style raw text and DOM tree."
        #text "
    "
        table
          #text "
      "
          tr
            th
              #text "Item"
            th
              #text "Price"
          #text "
      "
          tr
            td
              #text "Consulting"
            td
              #text "100"
          #text "
      "
          tr id="total"
            td
              #text "Total"
            td
              #text "100"
          #text "
    "
        #text "
  "
      #text "
"
    #text "
"
box_htmlWithStyles:
anonymous-block [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
  block html [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
    block body [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
      block main [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
        block h1 [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#1d4ed8 margin=21.44,0.00,12.00,0.00]
          text "Invoice demo" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#1d4ed8]
        block p [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222 margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
          text "This text verifies style raw text and DOM tree." [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
        table table [display=table position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
          table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
            table-cell th [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "Item" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
            table-cell th [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "Price" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
          table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
            table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "Consulting" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
            table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "100" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
          table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222 border=1.00,0.00,0.00,0.00]
            table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "Total" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
            table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
              text "100" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=#222]
cascade_htmlWithStyles:
#document [display=block]
  #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
  html [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    head [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      meta [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      title [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
        #text "DOM con CSS" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      style [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
        #text "
    body > main { font-family: serif; color: #222; }
    .invoice-title { color: #1d4ed8; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    #total { font-weight: bold; border-top: 1px solid #111; }
    .note::before { content: "<nota> "; }
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    body [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      main.invoice [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        h1.invoice-title [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#1d4ed8 margin=21.44,0.00,12.00,0.00]
          #text "Invoice demo" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#1d4ed8]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        p.note [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222 margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
          #text "This text verifies style raw text and DOM tree." [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        table [display=table font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          #text "
      " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          tr [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
            th [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "Item" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
            th [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "Price" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          #text "
      " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          tr [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
            td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "Consulting" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
            td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "100" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          #text "
      " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          tr#total [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222 border=1.00,0.00,0.00,0.00]
            td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "Total" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
            td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
              #text "100" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
          #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
        #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=#222]
      #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
box_htmlInvoiceTable:
anonymous-block [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
  block html [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
    block body [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black width=600.00]
      block h1 [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=24.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=#1d4ed8 text-align=center margin=21.44,0.00,21.44,0.00]
        text "INVOICE" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=24.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=#1d4ed8 text-align=center]
      table table [display=table position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black width=100.00 border=1.00,1.00,1.00,1.00]
        table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell th [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border=0.00,0.00,2.00,0.00]
            text "Item" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell th [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border=0.00,0.00,2.00,0.00]
            text "Price" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
        table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
            text "Consulting" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
            text "$100" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
        table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
            text "Development" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
            text "$250" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black border-bottom-style=dashed]
        table-row tr [display=table-row position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black page-break-before=avoid border-top-style=solid border-bottom-style=dashed]
            inline strong [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
              text "Total" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black page-break-before=avoid border-top-style=solid border-bottom-style=dashed]
            text "$350" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black page-break-before=avoid border-top-style=solid border-bottom-style=dashed]
      block p [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black text-align=right orphans=3 margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
        text "Thank you for your business" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="sans-serif" color=black text-align=right orphans=3]
cascade_htmlInvoiceTable:
#document [display=block]
  #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
  html [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    head [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      meta [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      style [display=none font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
        #text "
    body { font-family: sans-serif; }
    .invoice { width: 600px; }
    .invoice-title { font-size: 24px; color: #1d4ed8; text-align: center; }
    .invoice-table { border: 1px solid #333; width: 100%; }
    .invoice-table th { border-bottom: 2px solid #333; text-align: left; }
    .invoice-table td { border-bottom-style: dashed; }
    .invoice-table td { border-bottom-color: #ccc; }
    #total td { border-top-style: solid; page-break-before: avoid; }
    .footer { text-align: right; orphans: 3; }
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
      #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
    body.invoice [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      h1.invoice-title [display=block font-size=24.00 font-family=sans-serif color=#1d4ed8 margin=21.44,0.00,21.44,0.00]
        #text "INVOICE" [display=inline font-size=24.00 font-family=sans-serif color=#1d4ed8]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      table.invoice-table [display=table font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black border=1.00,1.00,1.00,1.00]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        tr [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          th [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black border=0.00,0.00,2.00,0.00]
            #text "Item" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          th [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black border=0.00,0.00,2.00,0.00]
            #text "Price" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        tr [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            #text "Consulting" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            #text "$100" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        tr [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            #text "Development" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            #text "$250" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        #text "
    " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        tr#total [display=table-row font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            strong [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
              #text "Total" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
          td [display=table-cell font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
            #text "$350" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
        #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      #text "
  " [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      p.footer [display=block font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
        #text "Thank you for your business" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
      #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=sans-serif color=black]
    #text "
" [display=inline font-size=16.00 font-family=serif color=black]
box_htmlAnonRow:
anonymous-block [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
  block html [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
    block body [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
      table table [display=table position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black border=1.00,1.00,1.00,1.00]
        anonymous-table-row [display=table position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
          table-cell td [display=table-cell position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black border-top-style=dashed border-right-style=dashed border-bottom-style=dashed border-left-style=dashed]
            text "cell without row" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black border-top-style=dashed border-right-style=dashed border-bottom-style=dashed border-left-style=dashed]
box_htmlInlineBlock:
anonymous-block [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
  block html [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
    block body [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
      block div [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
        block p [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
          text "Before the cards" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
        anonymous-block [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
          inline-block span [display=inline-block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black width=200.00 border=1.00,1.00,1.00,1.00 padding=10.00,10.00,10.00,10.00]
            inline span [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
              text "Card 1" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
            inline span [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
              text "content" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
          inline-block span [display=inline-block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black width=200.00 border=1.00,1.00,1.00,1.00 padding=10.00,10.00,10.00,10.00]
            inline span [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
              text "Card 2" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
            inline span [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
              text "content" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
        block p [display=block position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black margin=16.00,0.00,16.00,0.00]
          text "After the cards" [display=inline position=static float=none white-space=normal font-size=16.00 font-family="serif" color=black]
